title: ophrys × lioniana
intro: Ophrys × lioniana is a hybrid orchid, resulting from the cross between Ophrys lusitanica and Ophrys fusca, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant is valued for its potential in treating various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × lioniana include its ability to alleviate coughs, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory discomfort. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
